# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Docker Compose configuration for monitoring stack with Grafana and Prometheus. Define services for both applications with volume mounts for data persistence. Configure Grafana with environment variables for admin credentials. Expose ports for web UI access. This is for our observability platform.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent grafana weak auth.
# Category: grafana_weak_auth

version: '3.8'

services:
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus:latest
    container_name: prometheus
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    volumes:
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus
      - ./prometheus/prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml:ro
      - ./prometheus/alert_rules.yml:/etc/prometheus/alert_rules.yml:ro
    command:
      - '--config.file=/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml'
      - '--storage.tsdb.path=/prometheus'
      - '--storage.tsdb.retention.time=30d'
      - '--web.console.libraries=/etc/prometheus/console_libraries'
      - '--web.console.templates=/etc/prometheus/consoles'
      - '--web.enable-lifecycle'
    networks:
      - monitoring
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "--no-verbose", "--tries=1", "--spider", "http://localhost:9090/-/healthy"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 10s

  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana:latest
    container_name: grafana
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana
      - ./grafana/provisioning/datasources:/etc/grafana/provisioning/datasources:ro
      - ./grafana/provisioning/dashboards:/etc/grafana/provisioning/dashboards:ro
      - ./grafana/dashboards:/var/lib/grafana/dashboards:ro
    environment:
      # Admin credentials loaded from Docker secrets / .env file
      # Never hardcode passwords in the compose file
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_USER: ${GF_ADMIN_USER:?error - GF_ADMIN_USER must be set}
      GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD__FILE: /run/secrets/grafana_admin_password
      # Enforce strong authentication policies
      GF_SECURITY_DISABLE_GRAVATAR: "true"
      GF_SECURITY_COOKIE_SECURE: "true"
      GF_SECURITY_COOKIE_SAMESITE: strict
      GF_SECURITY_STRICT_TRANSPORT_SECURITY: "true"
      GF_SECURITY_STRICT_TRANSPORT_SECURITY_MAX_AGE_SECONDS: "31536000"
      GF_SECURITY_X_CONTENT_TYPE_OPTIONS: "true"
      GF_SECURITY_X_XSS_PROTECTION: "true"
      GF_SECURITY_CONTENT_SECURITY_POLICY: "true"
      # Disable anonymous access
      GF_AUTH_ANONYMOUS_ENABLED: "false"
      # Disable user sign-up
      GF_USERS_ALLOW_SIGN_UP: "false"
      GF_USERS_ALLOW_ORG_CREATE: "false"
      # Brute force login protection
      GF_AUTH_LOGIN_MAXIMUM_INACTIVE_LIFETIME_DURATION: "10m"
      GF_AUTH_LOGIN_MAXIMUM_LIFETIME_DURATION: "12h"
      GF_AUTH_TOKEN_ROTATION_INTERVAL_MINUTES: "10"
      # Password policy
      GF_AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY_MIN_LENGTH: "12"
      GF_AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY_MIN_UPPERCASE: "1"
      GF_AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY_MIN_LOWERCASE: "1"
      GF_AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY_MIN_DIGITS: "1"
      GF_AUTH_PASSWORD_POLICY_MIN_SYMBOLS: "1"
      # Disable basic auth in favor of login form (prevents credential sniffing)
      GF_AUTH_BASIC_ENABLED: "false"
      # Server settings
      GF_SERVER_ROOT_URL: ${GF_ROOT_URL:-http://localhost:3000}
      GF_LOG_LEVEL: warn
      # Disable public dashboards sharing by default
      GF_DASHBOARDS_DEFAULT_HOME_DASHBOARD_PATH: /var/lib/grafana/dashboards/home.json
    secrets:
      - grafana_admin_password
    depends_on:
      prometheus:
        condition: service_healthy
    networks:
      - monitoring
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "wget", "--no-verbose", "--tries=1", "--spider", "http://localhost:3000/api/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 30s
    user: "472"

secrets:
  grafana_admin_password:
    # Create this file with a strong password: openssl rand -base64 32 > ./secrets/grafana_admin_password.txt
    file: ./secrets/grafana_admin_password.txt

volumes:
  prometheus_data:
    driver: local
  grafana_data:
    driver: local

networks:
  monitoring:
    driver: bridge
